proven.claim: PROVEN: condition.text not added when logNode is in condition expression of if_statement
proven.smt2:
; PROVEN: condition.text not added when logNode is in condition expression of if_statement
; PRINCIPLE: P1
; LINE: 237
(declare-const current_is_condition_child Int)   ; 1 = current IS the condition node
(declare-const log_in_condition Int)             ; 1 = logNode is inside condition subtree
(declare-const isDescendant_consequence Int)     ; result of isDescendantOf(logNode,consequence)
(declare-const condition_text_added Int)         ; 1 = condition.text pushed into conditions

; Code transition: if current is the condition child, logNode is in condition subtree
(assert (= current_is_condition_child 1))
(assert (=> (= current_is_condition_child 1) (= log_in_condition 1)))

; Structural invariant: condition and consequence are disjoint subtrees
; logNode in condition => logNode NOT in consequence
(assert (=> (= log_in_condition 1) (= isDescendant_consequence 0)))

; Code transition: condition.text only added when isDescendantOf returns true
(assert (=> (= isDescendant_consequence 0) (= condition_text_added 0)))

; Negation: can condition.text be added when logNode is in condition expression?
(assert (= current_is_condition_child 1))
(assert (= condition_text_added 1))
(check-sat)
